---
title: "{{WEEK_LABEL}}"
date: "{{DATE}}"
categories: [{{CATEGORIES}}]
description: "{{DESCRIPTION}}"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
---

## Recap

{{RECAP}}

## Progress

{{PROGRESS}}

## Workflow

{{WORKFLOW_DIAGRAM}}

## Blockers & Questions

{{BLOCKERS}}

## Plan

{{PLAN}}

## Next Week

{{PLAN_DIAGRAM}}
